steps.name: 41. Verify Tradesman is still logged in on TradeMate
42. Click "View Details" on the first job in the listing
43. Click "Complete Registration" and select trade category (Plumber)
44. Set map location for the Tradesman profile

Fill "Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book. Fill "https://www.google.com" getByPlaceholder('Type your checkatrade profile link')

46. Upload profile documents and submit the profile form
